root_text.an4.50:1.1: “Cattārome, bhikkhave, candimasūriyānaṁ upakkilesā, yehi upakkilesehi upakkiliṭṭhā candimasūriyā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocanti.
root_text.an4.50:1.3: Abbhā, bhikkhave, candimasūriyānaṁ upakkilesā, yena upakkilesena upakkiliṭṭhā candimasūriyā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocanti.
root_text.an4.50:2.1: Mahikā, bhikkhave, candimasūriyānaṁ upakkilesā, yena upakkilesena upakkiliṭṭhā candimasūriyā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocanti.
root_text.an4.50:3.1: Dhūmo rajo, bhikkhave, candimasūriyānaṁ upakkileso, yena upakkilesena upakkiliṭṭhā candimasūriyā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocanti.
root_text.an4.50:4.1: Rāhu, bhikkhave, asurindo candimasūriyānaṁ upakkileso, yena upakkilesena upakkiliṭṭhā candimasūriyā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocanti.
root_text.an4.50:4.2: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro candimasūriyānaṁ upakkilesā, yehi upakkilesehi upakkiliṭṭhā candimasūriyā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocanti.
root_text.an4.50:5.1: Evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, cattārome samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ upakkilesā, yehi upakkilesehi upakkiliṭṭhā eke samaṇabrāhmaṇā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocanti.
root_text.an4.50:5.3: Santi, bhikkhave, eke samaṇabrāhmaṇā suraṁ pivanti merayaṁ, surāmerayapānā appaṭiviratā.
root_text.an4.50:5.4: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, paṭhamo samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ upakkileso, yena upakkilesena upakkiliṭṭhā eke samaṇabrāhmaṇā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocanti.
root_text.an4.50:6.1: Santi, bhikkhave, eke samaṇabrāhmaṇā methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevanti, methunasmā dhammā appaṭiviratā.
root_text.an4.50:6.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, dutiyo samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ upakkileso, yena upakkilesena upakkiliṭṭhā eke samaṇabrāhmaṇā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocanti.
root_text.an4.50:7.1: Santi, bhikkhave, eke samaṇabrāhmaṇā jātarūparajataṁ sādiyanti, jātarūparajatapaṭiggahaṇā appaṭiviratā.
root_text.an4.50:7.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, tatiyo samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ upakkileso, yena upakkilesena upakkiliṭṭhā eke samaṇabrāhmaṇā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocanti.
root_text.an4.50:8.1: Santi, bhikkhave, eke samaṇabrāhmaṇā micchājīvena jīvanti, micchājīvā appaṭiviratā.
root_text.an4.50:8.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, catuttho samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ upakkileso, yena upakkilesena upakkiliṭṭhā eke samaṇabrāhmaṇā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocanti.
root_text.an4.50:8.3: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ upakkilesā, yehi upakkilesehi upakkiliṭṭhā eke samaṇabrāhmaṇā na tapanti na bhāsanti na virocantīti.

translation_text.an4.50:1.1: “Mendicants, these four corruptions obscure the sun and moon, so they don’t shine and glow and radiate.
translation_text.an4.50:4.1: An eclipse of Rāhu, lord of titans …
translation_text.an4.50:4.2: These are four corruptions that obscure the sun and moon, so they don’t shine and glow and radiate.
translation_text.an4.50:5.1: In the same way, these four things corrupt ascetics and brahmins, so they don’t shine and glow and radiate.
translation_text.an4.50:5.3: There are some ascetics and brahmins who drink beer and wine, not refraining from drinking beer and wine.
translation_text.an4.50:5.4: This is the first thing that corrupts ascetics and brahmins …
translation_text.an4.50:6.1: There are some ascetics and brahmins who have sex, not refraining from sex.
translation_text.an4.50:6.2: This is the second thing that corrupts ascetics and brahmins …
translation_text.an4.50:7.1: There are some ascetics and brahmins who accept gold and currency, not refraining from receiving gold and currency.
translation_text.an4.50:7.2: This is the third thing that corrupts ascetics and brahmins …
translation_text.an4.50:8.1: There are some ascetics and brahmins who make a living the wrong way, not refraining from wrong livelihood.
translation_text.an4.50:8.2: This is the fourth thing that corrupts ascetics and brahmins …
translation_text.an4.50:8.3: These are four things that corrupt ascetics and brahmins, so they don’t shine and glow and radiate.
translation_text.an4.50:9.2: are plagued by greed and hate;
translation_text.an4.50:10.6: make a living the wrong way.
translation_text.an4.50:11.2: by the Buddha, Kinsman of the Sun.
translation_text.an4.50:12.2: bondservants of craving, full of attachments,
translation_text.an4.50:12.3: swell the horrors of the charnel ground,

variant_text.an4.50:11.6: asuddhā sarajā magā → addhuvā sarajāpagā (bj); asuddhā sarajā matā (sya-all); asuddhā sarajā pabhā (pts1ed)
